name: M4A1
description: M4A1 is the leader of the AR-Team, but lacks experience. Therefore, she is often described as a rather unreliable T-Doll lacking in decisiveness. M4A1 has a tendency for self-blame and second-guessing herself because she was told she is more important than other T-Doll since her creation. Her insecurity lead her to putting much less importance on her own life than others do, especially her team members. name: Mafuyu Seba
description: One of the very skilled examinees taking part in the JCC transfer exam in order to become an assassin. Mafuyu is a germaphobe, going to extreme lengths to avoid dirty things and reacting with incredible disgust whenever he gets dirty. In fact, he won't even use his hands in battle due to not wanting them to get filthy, opting to use blades hidden inside his shoes in order to fight. He is the younger brother of [Natsuki Seba](https://anilist.co/character/288223/).

name: Matsuri Sakuragi
description: Matsuri, nicknamed "Mats" in the manga, is an eleven-year-old glasses-wearing girl with a pet ferret named John, and is depicted as having a very timid personality in the story. She is often the subject of Miu's teasing and can resort to crying and hiding behind Nobue. She is one grade below Chika and Miu, in the same class as Ana, with whom she quickly became friends. name: Miu Takigawa
description: **Hometown:** Saitama **Motto:** None in particular. Introverted and not good at conversing with others. Due to her slightly awkward personality, she has problems smiling in front of the customers at her part-time job. Thinks dearly of her mother and little sister. (Source: Official Website)

name: Mizuho Kazami
description: __Height:__ 170 cm __Status:__ Galaxy Federation resident observer Mizuho is no ordinary high school teacher. She is actually a resident observer for the Galaxy Federation. Right after she lands on Earth, [Kei](https://anilist.co/character/2908) sees her materialize. The next morning by the lake, he discovers that she is his homeroom teacher, and his neighbor. name: Narsus
description: Narsus was once a chief adviser and tactician under Andragoras, but because he spoke out against the king's continuing practice of slavery, he was removed from his office. In addition to being a brilliant tactician, Narsus is also an incredible swordsman, an intelligent philosopher, and a not-so-skilled painter. He is Arslan's advisor, and Daryun's close friend.
